没有家世，没有兵权，没有逆天野心。
 
别人都在争天下、当霸主，
石骚只想：保命、吃饭、抱对大腿、好好活着。
 
天下大事？那是大哥曹操该操心的。
他要做的，就是护好兄弟，抱紧大腿，
在这乱世里，把小日子过得舒舒服服。
 
不赌命、不逞强、不装X。
看透人情世故，懂底层生存法则，
这是一个普通人，在乱世最清醒的活法。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/1fb78dee920053c14c883139f7d2035f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"咔咔饕餮","author_id":"","book_id":"7604975675027508248","book_name":"三国：曹操争霸，我享乐","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#681808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7604975823946269208","read_count":"54686","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"194348"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"94","tags":"历史古代,历史,系统,穿越,三国,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1fb78dee920053c14c883139f7d2035f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445390&x-signature=1x06T3XoBcHqT9Lqd0S5LeuVHcs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3975446507828494","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"80"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231823106A3FB21FBFDB96C30D78"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读57分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0
